message:
fix(test-runner): Exit with error when no test files found

When no test files match the patterns, the test runner was returning
successfully with exit code 0. This caused CI to parse nothing and
fall back to script's exit code (also 0), reporting false success.

Now prints parseable "0/0 passed (0%)" format and returns error.NoTestsFound
to ensure CI correctly detects this as a failure.
